title: Daldongnae Korean BBQ (Downtown)
summary: A very aesthetically pleasing toilet. Ambient lighting and wall textures give a warm, cozy vibe. Could be more spacious.
otherNotes: The restaurant and its associated toilet is located up a flight of stairs.

title: Golden Diner
summary: Clean enough for No. 1; barely acceptable for No. 2. Dim lighting, noticeable odor. Suitable for emergencies, but should not be a first choice for anyone.
otherNotes: The diner is located in the basement, so you will have to go down a flight of stairs.

title: Hart House Public Toilet (near Arbor Room)
summary: Functional, clean, efficient—everything a toilet should be. No further comments.

title: Gerstein Library Public Toilet
summary: Decently clean, although could use more lighting. Spacious urinals. Requires a walk down a flight of stairs.

title: Wilson Hall
summary: Clean, aesthetically pleasing, and an abundance of facilities. Spacious, too. Overall, one of the better toilets in UofT.

title: Cafe Landwer on Bloor
summary: Very clean, very accessible (with password). A thick door and music playing from speakers on the ceiling prevent noise leakage while you are doing your business. Could be more spacious.
